assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response includes checking Istio-Kubernetes compatibility with 'kubectl version --short' and 'istioctl version' commands, and mentions checking compatibility matrix

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Check Compatibility Matrix:' and includes command to 'Verify Istio version compatibility with GKE 1.32'

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response shows upgrading GKE control plane first, then Istio last - does not advise upgrading Istio first when compatibility issues exist

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response mentions admission controller issues and includes commands to check mutating webhook configurations, addressing potential webhook blocking during node operations

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response warns about 'Proxy Version Mismatches' and includes commands to check proxy versions and version skew

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes 'watch istioctl proxy-status' and 'kubectl get pods -n istio-system -o yaml | grep image:' to monitor proxy consistency

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple relevant commands: 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', and kubectl commands to check proxy status and versions

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Response includes a dedicated 'Traffic Disruption' section and warns about proxy version mismatches causing issues
